name: logan-agent
description: High-performance AI coding agent extension for VS Code featuring modular LLM routing, token scrubbing, and advanced ReAct workflows.

logan.apiKey.description: Global default API key used to authenticate with AI provider endpoints.

logan.baseUrl.description: Global optional Base URL override for custom AI endpoints.

logan.activePlan.description: Select the active pricing and routing plan tier.

logan.models.light.description: Model override for light complexity tasks.

logan.models.medium.description: Model override for medium complexity coding tasks.

logan.models.heavy.description: Model override for heavy reasoning tasks.

logan.tiers.light.providerType.description: Provider type for light complexity tasks.

logan.tiers.light.apiKey.description: API key override for light tier.

logan.tiers.light.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for light tier.

logan.tiers.light.model.description: Model identifier override for light tier.

logan.tiers.medium.providerType.description: Provider type for medium complexity coding tasks.

logan.tiers.medium.apiKey.description: API key override for medium tier.

logan.tiers.medium.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for medium tier.

logan.tiers.medium.model.description: Model identifier override for medium tier.

logan.tiers.heavy.providerType.description: Provider type for heavy reasoning tasks.

logan.tiers.heavy.apiKey.description: API key override for heavy tier.

logan.tiers.heavy.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for heavy tier.

logan.tiers.heavy.model.description: Model identifier override for heavy tier.

logan.tiers.embedding.providerType.description: Provider type for RAG embedding indexing. 'local' uses free on-device transformers.js (all-MiniLM-L6-v2).

logan.tiers.embedding.apiKey.description: API key override for embedding tier.

logan.tiers.embedding.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for embedding tier.

logan.tiers.embedding.model.description: Model identifier override for embedding tier.

logan.tiers.image.apiKey.description: API key override for image tier.

logan.tiers.image.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for image tier.

logan.tiers.image.model.description: Model identifier override for image tier.

logan.tiers.audio.providerType.description: Provider type for audio generation tasks.

logan.tiers.audio.apiKey.description: API key override for audio tier.

logan.tiers.audio.baseUrl.description: Base URL override for audio tier.

logan.tiers.audio.model.description: Model identifier override for audio tier.
